# Petra light-version fixtures

Source: `Petra_light-version.zip` → `static-site/` (repo root).

This is the **only** Petra fixture set used for ≥90 fidelity checks. Dark-theme
variants (`index-dark.html`) and legacy conversion-ready pages were removed.

Images in this folder are compressed for suite speed; full-resolution assets live
in `/workspace/test/` (same HTML) and in the zip.
